title: HarnessCommand
description: Discriminated union of commands sent from the cloud orchestrator to the Mac session-host daemon. The daemon's command allowlist enforces that only these three kinds are accepted — anything else is rejected and audit-logged. Only user-initiated input (voice or typed) ever produces a submit_with_steer or cancel; background events route through the registry instead.

correlation_id.description: Unique ID for this turn. Events emitted while executing this command carry the same correlation_id.

allOf.description: Submit a user message to the harness when it is idle. If the harness is busy, this command must be rejected by the daemon (the orchestrator should have used submit_with_steer).

Atomically cancel an in-flight turn and submit a new user message. Daemon executes provider-specific cancel for cancels_correlation_id, awaits cancel_confirmed (2s timeout), then submits text. Only user input ever produces this command.

cancels_correlation_id.description: The in-flight turn this command preempts.

allOf.description: Cancel an in-flight turn without submitting a replacement. Daemon executes provider-specific cancel and emits cancel_confirmed.
